mapper.select: SELECT d.*, u.name as userName FROM tutor_document d JOIN users u ON d.user_id = u.id WHERE d.reviewed_at IS NULL ORDER BY d.created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE tutor_document SET reviewed_by = #{adminId}, reviewed_at = NOW(),\ reject_reason = CASE WHEN UPPER(#{status}) = 'APPROVED' THEN NULL ELSE COALESCE(NULLIF(#{rejectReason}, ''), 'REJECTED') END, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT u.id as userId, u.name as userName, u.nickname, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN p.status IN ('PAID', 'REMITTED') THEN p.amount * 0.9 ELSE 0 END), 0) as totalAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN p.status = 'REMITTED' THEN p.amount * 0.9 ELSE 0 END), 0) as remittedAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN p.status = 'PAID' THEN p.amount * 0.9 ELSE 0 END), 0) as balance, CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN p.status = 'PAID' THEN p.amount * 0.9 ELSE 0 END), 0) > 0 THEN 'PENDING' ELSE 'COMPLETED' END as status FROM users u JOIN user_auth ua ON u.id = ua.user_id LEFT JOIN lesson l ON u.id = l.user_id LEFT JOIN booking b ON l.id = b.lesson_id LEFT JOIN payment p ON b.id = p.booking_id WHERE ua.auth = 'ROLE_TUTOR' GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.nickname

SELECT d.*, u.name as userName, u.nickname as userNickname, CASE WHEN d.reviewed_at IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN d.reject_reason IS NULL THEN 'APPROVED' ELSE 'REJECTED' END ELSE 'PENDING' END as status FROM tutor_document d JOIN users u ON d.user_id = u.id ORDER BY d.created_at DESC

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.name, u.nickname, u.status, u.created_at AS createdAt, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN ua.auth = 'ROLE_ADMIN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'ADMIN' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN ua.auth IN ('ROLE_TUTOR', 'ROLE_TUTOR_PENDING') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'TUTOR' ELSE 'USER' END AS role FROM users u JOIN user_auth ua ON u.id = ua.user_id GROUP BY u.id, u.username, u.name, u.nickname, u.status, u.created_at ORDER BY u.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE user_auth SET auth = CASE WHEN UPPER(#{role}) = 'ADMIN' THEN 'ROLE_ADMIN' WHEN UPPER(#{role}) = 'TUTOR' THEN 'ROLE_TUTOR' WHEN UPPER(#{role}) = 'USER' THEN 'ROLE_USER' ELSE auth END, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{id}
UPDATE payment p JOIN booking b ON p.booking_id = b.id JOIN lesson l ON b.lesson_id = l.id SET p.status = 'REMITTED', p.updated_at = NOW() WHERE l.user_id = #{tutorId} AND p.status = 'PAID'
